queryList.1: hp_slave: select config_key, config_value from hp_sys_app_config where config_key = 'DAILY_SPECIAL_OPEN_CONFIG' limit 1
queryList.2: hp_master: SELECT ta.id,ta.theme_sn,ta.subtitle_type,ta.subtitle_text,ta.theme_image_text,ta.auto_later_time,tc.index_image_url,tc.theme_color,tc.theme_image_url FROM hp_theme_activity ta LEFT JOIN hp_theme_color tc ON tc.id = ta.theme_color_id WHERE ta.is_deleted = 0 AND ta.city_name = '九江市' AND ta.active_status = 1 and ta.theme_type = 0 LIMIT 1
queryList.3: hp_master: SELECT id,rule_name,theme_sn,valid_type,start_time,end_time,rule_content_json,sort_score,active_status,is_deleted,create_id,create_time,update_id,update_time,rule_type,week_scope_limit,time_scope_type,time_scope_limit FROM hp_theme_activity_rule WHERE (theme_sn = '5641WRGOYX' AND is_deleted = 0 AND active_status = 1)
queryList.4: hp_master: SELECT business_category_id FROM `hp_theme_rule_relate_business_category` WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND theme_rule_id = 645 GROUP BY business_category_id
queryList.5: hp_master: SELECT activity_sn FROM `hp_theme_rule_relate_activity` WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND theme_rule_id = 645 GROUP BY activity_sn
queryList.6: hp_master: SELECT sdm.shop_id FROM hp_theme_product_discount_middle sdm,hp_shop_site_config ssc, shop s WHERE ssc.shop_id = sdm.shop_id and ssc.shop_id = s.`shop_id` and ssc.site ='HP' and ssc.visible=1 and s.is_del = 0 AND s.is_supermarket = 0 AND s.is_recommend = 1 AND s.audit_status = 1 and sdm.city_name = '九江市' AND sdm.update_time >= 1748491135010 GROUP BY sdm.shop_id
queryList.7: hp_master: SELECT s.shop_id, s.shop_name, s.shop_status, s.deliveryRange, s.delivery_type, s.shop_type, s.delivery_postcode_info, a.add_location, a.add_city, a.add_latitude, a.add_longitude, a.add_country, s.address_id, s.country, sea.max_delivery_range_meter, sea.easi_max_delivery_range_meter FROM shop s left join hp_shop_search_middle sea on s.shop_id = sea.shop_id LEFT JOIN address a ON s.address_id = a.add_id where s.city = '九江市' AND s.shop_id in ( 221864167 )
queryList.8: hp_master: select shop_id, fence_latlng from hp_shop_delivery_fence where shop_id in ( 221864167 ) and delivery_type = 1
queryList.9: hp_master: select product_id from ( SELECT sdm.product_id,sdm.shop_id,sdm.global_score,sdm.shop_status FROM hp_theme_product_discount_middle sdm LEFT JOIN product p on p.product_id = sdm.product_id LEFT JOIN hp_theme_rule_product_config trpc on trpc.product_id = sdm.product_id WHERE sdm.promote_type IN (1,4,8,10) AND sdm.city_name = '九江市' AND sdm.update_time >= 1748491135010 AND sdm.shop_id IN ( 221864167 ) AND ( (sdm.promote_type in (1,4,8) and sdm.discount_type = 2 and sdm.min_discount_value >= 10.00 and sdm.max_discount_value <= 99.00) ) AND trpc.theme_rule_id = 645 AND trpc.dimension_type = 0 AND (trpc.is_shielded is null or trpc.is_shielded = 0) AND trpc.is_advertisement = 1 order by sdm.shop_status asc,trpc.weight_value DESC )t1 group by product_id LIMIT 2
queryList.10: hp_master: select DISTINCT(product_id) as product_id from ( SELECT sdm.product_id,sdm.shop_id,sdm.global_score,sdm.shop_status FROM hp_theme_product_discount_middle sdm LEFT JOIN product p on p.product_id = sdm.product_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM hp_theme_rule_product_config WHERE is_deleted = 0 and theme_rule_id = 645 and dimension_type = 0) trpc ON trpc.product_id = p.product_id WHERE sdm.promote_type IN (1,4,8,10) AND p.is_del = 0 AND p.product_status = 0 AND sdm.city_name = '九江市' AND sdm.update_time >= 1748491135010 AND p.shop_id IN ( 221864167 ) AND ( (sdm.promote_type in (1,4,8) and sdm.discount_type = 2 and sdm.min_discount_value >= 10.00 and sdm.max_discount_value <= 99.00) ) AND (trpc.is_shielded is null or trpc.is_shielded = 0) AND (trpc.is_advertisement is null or trpc.is_advertisement = 0) order by sdm.shop_status asc,sdm.global_score desc )t1 LIMIT 0,500
queryList.11: hp_master: SELECT product_id,shop_id,global_score,shop_status FROM `hp_theme_product_discount_middle` WHERE city_name = '九江市' AND product_id IN ( 82458992 , 82458996 , 82458993 , 82458994 , 82458997 , 82458995 , 82458998 ) group by product_id,shop_id
queryList.12: hp_master: SELECT p.product_id, p.shop_id, s.shop_name, p.country, s.deliveryRange, s.shop_logo, s.recommend_sort, s.auto_open_close, s.is_week_operation, p.product_img, p.product_price, p.product_name, s.shop_status, s.peak_time, s.off_peak_time, a.add_latitude, a.add_city, a.add_longitude, e.praise_average, e.praise_average_manager, e.composite,e.composite_manager,e.shop_evaluation_num, p.product_status, s.shop_type, p.product_sale_type, sm.preorder_closed_support, i.preorder_open_type, s.is_week_operation, s.delivery_faraway_type, s.auto_open_close, s.is_user_pack, hdpsn.sale_num_last_30_day as product_sale_num, s.recommend_sort_easi, p.block_type ,sm.shop_order_stop_time FROM product p left join hp_data_product_sale_num as hdpsn on p.product_id = hdpsn.product_id LEFT JOIN shop s ON s.shop_id = p.shop_id LEFT JOIN address a ON a.add_id = s.address_id LEFT JOIN evaluation e ON e.shop_id = p.shop_id LEFT JOIN shop_extra_info i on i.shop_id=s.shop_id left join hp_shop_search_middle sm on s.shop_id = sm.shop_id WHERE p.is_del = 0 AND p.product_status = 0 AND s.is_del = 0 AND p.product_id IN ( 82458998 , 82458992 , 82458997 , 82458993 , 82458994 , 82458995 , 82458996 ) order by case when s.shop_status=0 and s.shop_order_busy_status=0 and s.shop_order_stop_status=0 then 1 when s.shop_status=0 and s.shop_order_busy_status=1 and s.shop_order_stop_status=0 then 2 when s.shop_status=0 and s.shop_order_stop_status=1 and sm.preorder_open_type!=3 then 3 when s.shop_status=1 and sm.preorder_closed_support=1 then 4 when s.shop_status=0 and s.shop_order_stop_status=1 and sm.preorder_open_type=3 then 5 when s.shop_status=1 and sm.preorder_closed_support=0 then 6 when s.shop_status!=0 and s.shop_status!=1 then 7 end, p.product_price asc
queryList.13: hp_master: SELECT user_id,user_name,user_nick,user_password,user_pic,user_telphone,user_wx_openid,role_id,user_Invitation_code,create_time,update_time,is_del,reg_ip,user_status,user_salt,user_sex,audit_status,register_source,is_work,real_name,user_push_token,bs,tmp_uid,tmp_money,tmp_total_money,tmp_integral,tmp_order_counts,tmp_pmid,receiving_max,country,user_code,user_email,city_name,is_add_insure,country_code,is_add_zego,phone_number,run_type,base_salary,calling_code,is_tip_show,is_auto_receive_order,is_can_take_order,delivery_remark,qiyu_remark,is_special_driver,first_name,last_name,employee_type,hourly_salary,salary_rule_type,billing_cycle,send_count,shift_type,contract_status,id_photo_front,id_photo_back,star,driver_score,driver_score_frozen_expiry_date,reg_area_id,user_ali_open_id,user_wx_id,new_user_status,delivery_new_user_status,allow_promote,user_name_mask,user_telphone_mask,phone_number_mask,user_email_mask FROM user WHERE user_id=1398716816
queryList.14: hp_master: SELECT a.shop_id, b.discount_sn, b.date_type, b.day_limit, b.time_limit, b.time_slot_type, b.crowd, c.sub_state, c.break_type, d.city FROM hp_delivery_discount_shop a LEFT JOIN hp_delivery_discount b ON a.discount_sn = b.discount_sn LEFT JOIN hp_activity_config c ON b.activity_sn = c.activity_sn LEFT JOIN shop d on a.shop_id=d.shop_id WHERE b.is_del = 0 AND a.is_del = 0 AND b.discount_status = 1 AND b.start_time <= 1748491163255 AND b.end_time > 1748491163255 AND a.shop_id IN ( 221864167 ) AND 1748491163255 between a.start_time and a.end_time
queryList.15: hp_master: SELECT rec_id,start_tudustr,target_tudustr,distance,update_time FROM ads_hp_search_distance_matrix WHERE (target_tudustr = '115.954,29.660' AND start_tudustr IN ('115.943,29.670','115.943,29.670','115.943,29.670','115.943,29.670','115.943,29.670','115.943,29.670','115.943,29.670'))
queryList.16: hp_master: select shop_id ,send_money from hp_shop_search_middle where shop_id in ( 221864167 )
queryList.17: hp_slave: select config_key, config_value from hp_sys_app_config where config_key = 'MAKE_TIME_DEFAULT' limit 1
queryList.18: hp_master: SELECT discount_value FROM `hp_theme_product_score` WHERE city_name = '九江市' AND product_id IN ( 82458998 , 82458992 , 82458997 , 82458993 , 82458994 , 82458995 , 82458996 ) ORDER BY discount_value ASC LIMIT 1
queryList.19: hp_master: select ps.product_sku_id,ps.product_id, ps.value_name, ps.product_sku_price,ps.is_default,ps.platform_price,ps.is_default_spec,p.`buy_limit_min`, p.is_special,p.menu_id,p.shop_id from product_sku ps, product p where ps.`product_id` = p.`product_id` AND ps.product_id in ( 82458998 , 82458992 , 82458997 , 82458993 , 82458994 , 82458995 , 82458996 ) and ps.is_del=0 and ps.status = 1 and p.is_del = 0 order by ps.product_sku_id limit 3500
queryList.20: hp_master: select a.rec_id, a.shop_id, a.product_id, a.sku_id, a.promote_price, a.promote_type, a.promote_sn, e.limit_purchase_num, hpd.limit_purchase_type, hpd.discount_dimension, e.shop_contribution_rate, c.stock_num, c.lock_num, g.sub_state, hpd.discount_type, hpd.discount_limit, e.discount_value, g.break_type, e.threshold, hpd.is_threshold_limit, hpd.use_channel from hp_product_sku_price as a, hp_product_discount as hpd, hp_sku_promote_stock as c, hp_product_discount_detail as e, `hp_activity_config` as g where a.promote_sn = hpd.discount_sn and a.promote_sn = c.promote_sn and a.sku_id = c.sku_id and a.promote_type = c.promote_type and hpd.status = 1 and hpd.sts = 1 and a.promote_sn = e.discount_sn and a.sku_id = e.sku_id and e.status = 1 and hpd.`activity_sn` = g.`activity_sn` and a.product_id in ( 82458998 , 82458992 , 82458997 , 82458993 , 82458994 , 82458995 , 82458996 ) AND hpd.promote_type in ( 1 , 4 , 8 , 10 ) and hpd.use_channel in (0,1) and a.start_time <= 1748491163 and a.end_time > 1748491163 and a.start_hour <= 11 and a.end_hour > 11 and a.start_week_day <= 4 and a.end_week_day >= 4
queryList.21: hp_master: SELECT p.product_id, a.rec_id, a.shop_id, a.menu_id, a.promote_type, a.promote_sn, e.shop_contribution_rate, hpd.discount_type, e.discount_value, hpd.discount_dimension, hpd.discount_limit, e.limit_purchase_num, hpd.limit_purchase_type, hpd.threshold, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.start_hour, a.end_hour, a.start_week_day, a.end_week_day, g.sub_state, g.break_type FROM (select shop_id,product_id,menu_id from product where product_id in ( 82458998 , 82458992 , 82458997 , 82458993 , 82458994 , 82458995 , 82458996 ) ) p, hp_shop_menu_discount_price a, hp_shop_menu_discount_detail e, hp_product_discount hpd, `hp_activity_config` as g WHERE p.menu_id = a.menu_id AND p.menu_id = e.menu_id AND hpd.discount_sn = a.promote_sn AND hpd.discount_sn = e.discount_sn AND hpd.`status` = 1 AND hpd.sts = 1 AND e.`status` = 1 AND hpd.discount_dimension = 2 AND hpd.`activity_sn` = g.`activity_sn` AND hpd.promote_type in ( 1 , 4 , 8 , 10 ) and hpd.use_channel in (0,1) and a.start_time <= 1748491163 and a.end_time > 1748491163 and a.start_hour <= 11 and a.end_hour > 11 and a.start_week_day <= 4 and a.end_week_day >= 4
queryList.22: hp_master: SELECT p.product_id, a.rec_id, a.shop_id, a.menu_id, a.promote_type, a.promote_sn, e.shop_contribution_rate, hpd.discount_type, e.discount_value, hpd.discount_dimension, hpd.limit_purchase_type, hpd.discount_limit, e.limit_purchase_num, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.start_hour, a.end_hour, a.start_week_day, a.end_week_day, g.sub_state, g.break_type, hpd.threshold, hpd.is_threshold_limit FROM (select shop_id,product_id,menu_id from product where product_id in ( 82458998 , 82458992 , 82458997 , 82458993 , 82458994 , 82458995 , 82458996 ) ) p, hp_shop_menu_discount_price a, hp_shop_menu_discount_detail e, hp_product_discount hpd, `hp_activity_config` as g WHERE p.shop_id = a.shop_id AND p.shop_id = e.shop_id AND hpd.discount_sn = a.promote_sn AND hpd.discount_sn = e.discount_sn AND hpd.`status` = 1 AND hpd.sts = 1 AND e.`status` = 1 AND hpd.discount_dimension = 3 AND hpd.`activity_sn` = g.`activity_sn` AND hpd.promote_type in ( 1 , 4 , 8 , 10 ) and hpd.use_channel in (0,1) and a.start_time <= 1748491163 and a.end_time > 1748491163 and a.start_hour <= 11 and a.end_hour > 11 and a.start_week_day <= 4 and a.end_week_day >= 4
queryList.23: hp_master: select p.product_id, shop_id, menu_id from product p where p.product_id in ( 82458998 , 82458992 , 82458997 , 82458993 , 82458994 , 82458995 , 82458996 )
queryList.24: hp_master: SELECT id,shop_id,menu_id,limit_type,is_del,manage_id,update_time,create_time FROM hp_product_discount_shop_limit WHERE (shop_id IN (221864167))
